description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Indigo Docker images preparation that allows manual dispatch. The workflow should have three ubuntu-latest jobs: docker-buildpack-almalinux8, docker-buildpack-arm64, and docker-indigo-tester. Each job logs in to DockerHub, checks out the repository with LFS and a fetch depth of 500, builds a specific Docker image using a provided Dockerfile, and pushes the image to DockerHub with the latest tag.
